selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 10.2% and 20-day momentum is 16.3%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 12.2% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 3.5%, downside volatility near 2.8%, and a recent max drawdown of 9.6%.
Volume confirmation is 3.9% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 9.9% versus SPY over 5 days and 8.1% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is neutral with score 0.42, confidence 0.74, and 0.7 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow neutral at 0.42, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 2 sources, 0.7 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.79, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.74.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.01).
Overall model score is 0.082 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: Meta’s reply on Instagram ads promoting CSAM ‘under investigation’: MeitY’s Krishnan
news_evidence.llm_reason: Government investigation into Meta's handling of alleged CSAM-related Instagram ads is a regulatory/legal story for Meta (large user base in India). This can increase downside risk via reputational damage, regulatory scrutiny, possible fines or required remediation costs, and could weigh on near-term share performance.

news_evidence.title: Meta’s Potential AI Cloud Push Could Boost Earnings, Wolfe Research Says
news_evidence.llm_reason: Direct, company-specific analyst coverage highlighting a potential AI cloud strategy and an Outperform/reaffirmation can drive near-term positive sentiment and flows into META. Likely to move stock intraday/short-term if amplified, but not guaranteed to produce sustained fundamental change in 1-10 days.
